name: VoreDash (Pred POV)
description:
Voredash, prey right to your door! Navigate our rich catalog of prey items and make your choice.

Found this old-ish image from Khaba024 on my twitter feed the other day, and it inspired me to modify my Vorecon bot's definition a bit to make this bot.

For this one, I've tried using a more futuristic setting and introducing the concept of reformation.

Since Janitor doesn't allow alternate greeting messages, and I didn't have in mind a single universal first message like in my Vorecon bot, I've had to make two separate bots.

This is the Pred POV one, placing you as one of the customers browsing through the app for dinner.

Suggested Custom prompt: https://pastebin.com/TJifXWPc

If you're interested in my bots, check out all the platforms I'm on at the following link: https://linktr.ee/hobold_kobold
creator: Hobold
